compiled_state.title: [RED] Write tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh for backfill script
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Write tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh testing ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh (does not yet exist). RED tests: (1) script creates .archived marker for each ticket dir that has an ARCHIVED event but no existing .archived file; (2) script skips ticket dirs that already have .archived marker; (3) script is idempotent (running twice produces same result); (4) script does not create marker for tickets with no ARCHIVED event; (5) script outputs count of markers written. Use TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR env injection pattern. testing_mode: RED.

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: test file tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh exists
- [ ] Verify: test covers creating .archived marker for dirs with ARCHIVED event
- [ ] Verify: test covers skipping dirs with existing .archived marker (idempotent)
- [ ] Verify: test covers not creating marker for tickets with no ARCHIVED event
- [ ] Verify: test covers output count of markers written
comments.author: Test
